text:
Market today:
The mood is cautious, with global economic signals mixed. The real driver for your tech/chip names remains interest rate expectations and global demand, especially from China.

Your holdings:
SOXL (-31.31%) and SPAL (-24.25%) are leveraged and decaying, needing immediate attention due to significant losses. QQQI (-1.9%) is close to its stop at 52. Remember, margin amplifies these drops.

Watch:
Keep an eye on SMH, which is down 6.82% and has a scanner WATCH setup at a discount. Also, watch for any broader market weakness impacting your concentrated tech book.

Bottom line:
Focus on managing your leveraged positions and respecting stops to protect capital.
plays: SOXL is down over 31% and leveraged. Seriously consider trimming or exiting to cut losses and reduce decay risk on margin.
SPAL, a new leveraged ETF, is down 24.25%. Review its 21.38 stop; consider tightening or exiting due to high volatility and margin exposure.
QQQI is close to its 52 stop. Be prepared to trim or exit if it breaks this level to protect your "income anchor."
